query:
SELECT
                        r.doc_targets,
                        cov.total_items,
                        cov.documented_items
                    FROM
                        crates as c
                        INNER JOIN releases AS r ON c.id = r.crate_id
                        LEFT OUTER JOIN doc_coverage AS cov ON r.id = cov.release_id
                    WHERE
                        c.name = $1 AND
                        r.version = $2
